---
title: 'Um.... confused...'
date: '2016-11-30T05:26:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7383748072648081370'
blogger_filename: '/2016/11/um-confused.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Venting'
---

So... I got home tonight and she was still up, as her habit has been for the last month. She was really nice to me, the house was clean, she was doing dishes, and she said she'd researched smoke and how to keep the smell down. She suggested a smoking jacket and a special laundry basket separate from the one she uses for her and the kids. So... that happened.
